summary: Phase 6 PhD-level analysis of the Agent Swarm (81+ files). Analyzed base classes, SMC/ICT structure, Predator agents, PhD/Ascension level logic, and Apocalypse weapons. Found dead code (bypassed python logic due to early C++ return), inaccessible metadata dict keys, and completely inert agents like T-Cell Weaponized (missing kwargs from NeuralSwarm).
